evidence_label: recipient evidence card gate, not contact permission or treatment advice
required_public_fields: source evidence reference, with raw candidate URLs kept private after the June 19 refinement
cost, timeline, ethics, biosafety, and material-constraint labels
release_block_if: real recipient name or contact detail appears
patient records or patient samples appear
treatment, trial-screening, purchase, import, or procurement scope appears
source bundle reference or allowed non-identifying public source evidence is missing
decision_rule: A public recipient evidence card can classify a future recipient alias by capability, but it cannot select, name, contact, endorse, or clinically route any organization.
